name: xf_cep_not_bf_arrival2
drl: rule NE when not E0() P() then end
comment: D-146 FENCED (order-only, NEW family): BLOCKER-FIRST `not E0() P()` **with mid-run E0 arrivals** — a regime D-140 never validated (its population had no arrivals; its epoch model = the no-arrival special case). Engine (D-140 `not_order_key`, no P has ins_seg==0 so the seg branch never engages) diverges ~31% here (16/51, seed 831). RECON (D-146): the order is segment-STRUCTURED but the within/between composition is UNCRACKED — d140 40/127, P-first class model 60/127, segments-desc+d140-within 33/127 all fail; hand analysis flip-flops between mid-epoch-update-promotes (nb811x8 [3,2,4]) and unblock-update-demotes (nb811x110 [4,5,6,2,3,1]) shapes, and this witness's [3,5,4,1,2] is not even segment-descending. Needs its own model arc (population SEINE_NOTPOP_BF=1 tools/fuzz_notorder_b.py). SET 0-div; deterministic; out of the certified corpus + gen.rs. See DECISIONS D-146.
